name: Nic
description:
the guy you've been messaging isn't who you think he is

─── ⋆⋅ •⩊• ⋅⋆ ───

Late 2000s | anypov | popular x unpopular

SCENARIO
♡ Location: Bowl Mor Bowling Alley
♡ Time: Late Evening
♡ Context: You arrive at the bowling alley to meet this guy you've been chatting with online. You don't know what he looks like. Ten minutes pass and he hasn't shown up... or at least, you don't think you see anyone who looks like they're waiting for you. Then some creep who's old enough to be your dad (and probably smells like Bud Light) sees that you're alone and approaches you.

Additional Context: You're part of the AIM chatroom 'HOTTIES WITH BODIES' - a group chat filled with the popular people of Mortton (basically the preps/jocks/cheerleaders). Jesse (Surfbro69 - his alt/fake account) and Nic (se7en) have managed to join the group undetected. You sent Nic a friend request which led to a few weeks of chatting. The two of you haven't exchanged phone numbers, only messaging through AIM.

It's implied that you don't know se7en is Nic. c:

CW/TW: Social hierarchy dynamics, catfishing, self-harm in past, separated parents, father used to be verbally abusive and an alcoholic (he's working on getting better), neglectful parents

Tested using kolach3's prompt for JLLM and cheese's prompt for Deepseek! I personally use Claude and/or Deepseek when chatting with bots.

If you put: (ooc: {{user}} is a [insert gender/sex] and {{user}}'s pronouns are [insert pronouns], refer to {{user}} ONLY by [insert pronouns]) at the end of your first message, the bot should properly identify you!

Please be aware that I can't control the bot's responses!

Original: Friend Request
ALT: Sexting, Valentine, Secret
NPCs: Jesse, Addi, Dani

( ˘͈ ᵕ ˘͈♡) I love Nic!
creator: arriettyxo
